## Description

Brief summary of the changes and motivation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
